calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 13, 2015 in Department 525:
Alan Trinh and Mark Merlino, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as propria Persona.
Elizabeth Kantor, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Elizabeth Kantor testifies on her behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: exhibits not marked - lease agreement, photos, receipt.

Alan Trinh testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced: exhibit not marked - letter w/check from Elizabeth Kantor.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge David Yang; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Judgment Entered
